diffs.diff:
--- a/check_triposr4.py
+++ b/check_triposr4.py
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+import sys

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+import inspect

+from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras, get_ray_directions, get_rays

+print('get_spherical_cameras source:')

+print(inspect.getsource(get_spherical_cameras))

+print('\nget_ray_directions source:')

+print(inspect.getsource(get_ray_directions))

+print('\nget_rays source:')

+print(inspect.getsource(get_rays))
